name: GH Research PLC
description: GH Research PLC is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to transforming the treatment of psychiatric and neurological disorders. The company's focus is on developing novel therapies, particularly ultra-rapid-acting psychedelic medicines, for patients with treatment-resistant depression and other neuropsychiatric indications. Its lead product candidate, GH001, is an inhalable 5-MeO-DMT formulation designed to deliver rapid and durable therapeutic effects.
